audit_items.proof_trace: The implementation correctly supports epoch-dependent max_blobs_per_block via BlobSchedule. The blob_parameters_for_epoch lookup returns different BlobParameters entries based on epoch ranges, as evidenced by test coverage showing distinct values (6, 24, 48 blobs) across epoch boundaries. The mechanism is actively integrated into compute_fork_digest and all_digest_epochs, fulfilling EIP-7892 requirements.
